transcript:
CALLER: Hello. I need to see a gastroenterologist. I've been having acid reflux issues for months now.
AGENT: I'm sorry to hear that. Let me help you book an appointment. Your name please?
CALLER: Abhijeet More. 9822334455.
AGENT: Thank you Abhijeet. Our gastroenterologist Dr. Nitin Kadam is available on Tuesday and Friday mornings. Any preference?
CALLER: Friday would be better. What time?
AGENT: We have 9:30 AM and 11 AM on Friday.
CALLER: 9:30 AM please. Let's get it over with early.
AGENT: Done! Abhijeet More, Friday at 9:30 AM with Dr. Nitin Kadam. SMS on the way. See you Friday!
